install.cta: Add ParkBack to your home screen
install.ctaAriaIos: Show me how to add ParkBack to my home screen
install.ctaAriaChromium: Add ParkBack to your home screen

fallback.desktopSafariFirefox: Add ParkBack to your home screen for one-tap access. Use your browser's bookmarking option to keep it accessible. No app store needed — it's free, no signup, works offline.
fallback.unknown: ParkBack works on any device. Use your browser's "Add to home screen" option to keep it accessible.

banner.home: Add ParkBack to your home screen. Works in any dead zone. No cell signal, wifi, or app store needed. Free, no signup. Your pin, photo, and voice memo are saved on your phone — no cell or wifi signal required to find your car.
banner.find: Like what you see? Add ParkBack to your home screen and never lose your own car. Works in any dead zone — no cell signal, wifi, or app store needed. Free, no signup.

ahtsCard.title: Add ParkBack to your home screen
ahtsCard.body: The whole thing — your pin, photo, voice memo, and the compass back to your car — works without cell signal or wifi. Even in the deepest parking deck.

overlay.title: Add ParkBack to your home screen
overlay.body: Three taps in Safari. After this, ParkBack opens like any app — works in any dead zone, no cell or wifi signal needed.
overlay.step1: Tap the share button at the bottom of Safari.
overlay.step2: Scroll down and tap Add to Home Screen.
overlay.step3: Tap Add in the top right corner.
overlay.ariaLabel: How to add ParkBack to your home screen

install.installedToast: ParkBack is on your home screen. Open it like any other app.

home.tagline: Find your car. No accounts. No cloud.
home.positioningLine1: No app store. No login. No subscription. No ads. No tracking. No signal needed.
home.positioningLine2: The parking app that should have existed years ago.
home.firstVisitExplainer: Tap when you park. Come back, tap again, walk straight to your car. Works in underground garages with zero cell or wifi signal. Your phone's GPS does the work.
home.hintRequesting: Hold still. High-accuracy GPS takes a moment.
home.hintIdle: Tap when you've parked. Works offline.

perm.noBrowserSupport: Your browser doesn't support location. ParkBack needs location to remember where you parked.
perm.denied: ParkBack needs your location to remember where you parked. Tap to retry.
perm.unavailable: Couldn't find your location. Step outside or move away from tall buildings, then tap to retry.
perm.timeout: Location took too long. Tap to retry.

compass.calibrating: Calibrating compass — wave phone in a figure-8
compass.instruction: Hold phone flat, arrow points to car.

actions.sendAria: Send my parking spot to someone

toasts.savedAck: Got it. Walk wherever. Come back when you need your car.

errors.photoFailed: Couldn't process that photo. Try again.
errors.voiceUnsupported: Voice notes need microphone access. Your browser doesn't support it here.
errors.micDenied: Microphone access denied. Voice notes are optional — you can still navigate back to your car.

share.title: ParkBack — my parking spot
share.messageNoLandmark: Here's where my car is parked.

find.headerTitle: Someone shared their parking spot with you.
find.linkInvalidBody: The shared link is missing or invalid coordinates. Ask the person who sent it to share again.
find.navigateAria: Navigate to the shared parking spot
find.recipientCta: Get ParkBack for your own car →
